Reflections in the rearview—no following vehicle for seventeen consecutive frames. The shoulder is soft black, absorbing light. No reflectors visible for a full three seconds. Normal for this stretch. After the bridge, the road opens like a palm. Raindrops hit the lens at oblique angles, building small galaxies on the surface before the wipers smear them into oblivion. Each droplet carries its own microcosm of sodium-vapor light—orange halos that bloom and die in milliseconds. **Frame Analysis:** - Frame 0423: Guardrail reflection stable, no debris - Frame 0424: Shoulder check - empty, white line intact - Frame 0425: Overhead sign illegible (water distortion) - Frame 0426-0428: Tunnel approach, lights creating strobe pattern - Frame 0429: Interior lens captures hands at ten-and-two.
